insights: Community analytics should be rebuilt around WhatsApp and current member-platform behavior.
Search Console and donations remain visible as pending/manual source statuses.
This first Portal migration uses a server-only snapshot while automation remains in the legacy dashboard pipeline.

selfDescription.label: Professional in the psychedelic field (e.g., clinician, researcher, policy advocate)
Professional in a related field (e.g., healthcare, education, nonprofit, tech, law)
Professional Degree Student (MD, JD, MBA, etc.)
College graduate, interested in entering the psychedelic field
I am a therapist (LSW, currently in pursuit of LCSW licensure)- I do not work directly with psychedelics yet, but plan to in my clinical work as research develops.

workStatus.label: Not yet – I’m interested in working in the field
Yes – I currently work in the field
No – I don’t plan to work in the field

referralSource.label: The Psychedelic Handbook by Rick Strassman

items.label: Agender/I do not identify with any gender

instagramPosts.caption:
PsychedelX 2026 is officially over, and we are thrilled to announce the runners-up and winners of this year’s talk competition!

🏅Runner up: Faith Halverson-Ramos
🏅Runner up: Jake Hooper
🏅Runner up: Taylor Andrews Flatt
🥉3rd place: Andrew Ferns
🥈2nd place: Lauren Marchefka
🥇1st p

Join us for a lively conversation on the harmonic melodies underlying various states of consciousness, with Dr. Selen Atasoy, our final speaker on “The Shape of Consciousness” series before our Roundtable Talk with the three of our previous guests.

Selen is a neuroscientist who

We are very excited to announce that Professor Alex Kwan will be joining PsychedelX Day 3 as a keynote speaker!

Alex Kwan is a Professor in the Meinig School of Biomedical Engineering at Cornell University. He is broadly interested in the neurobiology of drugs for treating menta

Introducing the IPN Member Portal: IPN’s Hub For Member-Exclusive Events, Resources, and Community Connection.

Here, IPN members can:

📆Join events: browse, join, and watch IPN events.
🔎Discover & connect: search the member directory to find members in your area and with similar

Congratulations to the 6 finalists of PsychedelX 2026! 🌟 

These PsychedelX participant talks were selected for further review by our panel of professional judges who will determine this year’s talk competition winners! 

The conference is 1 DAY AWAY (June 26th) – register today

Thank you to our Judges of PsychedelX 2026!

We truly value your expertise and dedication to uplifting the next generation of students and rising professionals. 

Professional talk competition judges provide valuable feedback and evaluate our PsychedelX finalists talks to select

Meet the PsychedelX Day 3 keynote speaker: Dr. Paul Regier 🌟

Dr. Regier is a Research Assistant Professor of Psychiatry at the University of Pennsylvania Perelman School of Medicine, where he works in the Center for Studies of Addiction.

His research integrates brain imaging, n

PsychedelX Day 2 Graduate Panel – “Paths Into Psychedelics” – will bring together Natasha Greenstein, Rafaelle Lancelotta, and Iva Totomanova for a conversation on graduate studies, research pathways, and emerging directions in psychedelic science.

Natasha (@natasha.cg) is a sci

Meet the PsychedelX Day 2 keynote speaker: Manvir Singh, PhD. 🌟 @mnvrsngh on X 

Dr. Singh is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Anthropology at the University of California, Davis, and the author of Shamanism: The Timeless Religion. His work explores why human societies

Meet the PsychedelX Day 1 keynote speakers! ✨

@petersjostedth Dr Peter Sjöstedt-Hughes is a philosopher of mind and metaphysics, lecturer in the Department of Psychology at the University of Exeter, and founder of the Exeter Psychedelic Interdisciplinary Centre. His keynote will

Meet the PsychedelX Day 3 speakers!

Day 3 of the conference will feature presentations exploring topics in STEM & Natural Sciences 🔬

PsychedelX is a virtual student talk conference spotlighting emerging voices and novel perspectives in psychedelic research, culture, and practic

Meet the PsychedelX Day 2 speakers!

Day 2 of the conference will feature presentations exploring topics in Culture, Anthropology & Sociology 🌍
PsychedelX is a virtual student talk conference spotlighting emerging voices and novel perspectives in psychedelic research, culture, an

Meet the PSYCHEDELX DAY 1 speakers! 
Day 1 of the conference will feature presentations exploring topics in Psychology & Clinical Applications💡

PsychedelX returns for it’s 6th year with an exciting lineup of speakers! The virtual conference will begin on June 26th – get your tic

Registration for PsychedelX 2026 virtual conference is now OPEN! 🎉
📆June 26th- June28th!

PsychedelX is back for the 6th edition showcasing novel and impactful talks from students and rising professionals in the psychedelic space. 🌟

This is an event you won’t want to miss! 

Reg
